name: Bark Wallet
description: One wallet for Lightning, Ark, and on-chain
compose:
name: slashnode-bark-wallet
services:
  web:
    image: secondark/bark-web:0.2.6
    container_name: bark-wallet-web
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    depends_on:
      - api
      - barkd
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:4004:8080
  api:
    image: secondark/bark-web-api:0.2.6
    container_name: bark-wallet-api
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    depends_on:
      - barkd
    environment:
      PORT: '4001'
      WALLET_DIR: /wallet-data/.bark
      WALLET_DATA_PATH: /Apps/bark-wallet/data/wallet/.bark/
      BARKD_URL: http://barkd:4000
      ARK_SERVER: https://ark.second.tech
      CHAIN_SOURCE: https://mempool.second.tech/api
      BARK_NETWORK: mainnet
    volumes:
      - api_data-wallet:/wallet-data:ro
  barkd:
    image: secondark/bark:0.2.5
    container_name: bark-wallet-barkd
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    command: |
      sh -c "mkdir -p /data/.bark && chown -R 1000:1000 /data && exec setpriv --reuid 1000 --regid 1000 --clear-groups /usr/local/bin/barkd --port 4000 --host 0.0.0.0 --datadir /data/.bark"
    volumes:
      - barkd_data-wallet:/data
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  api_data-wallet:
    name: slashnode-bark-wallet_api_data-wallet
  barkd_data-wallet:
    name: slashnode-bark-wallet_barkd_data-wallet
